title: Holger Soup and Sorcery
description:
This Mod adds many soup themed items to the game.

Also a flying soup boiler that attacks you and a Soup Biome and Dimension.

Also this mod adds the substance Holrosium and Holgarium, Crows and a Bossfight with Holger.
body:
This Mod adds Soup Themed Items, Mobs, an soupy Biome and a Soup Dimension.

Also it adds the mythical substances Holrosium and Holgarium, Crows (and the secret Holger Bossfight coming soon).

You can (soon) fight the epic Holger Boss, explore the new Dimensions and Biomes, try out the new items and much more.

The Idea is from an inside joke with a friend of mine.

Created by true_lock and Doenergepard.

If you need help or just want to contact us goto 
[Our Discord Server](https://discord.gg/36bPs8cQ5B)

Or send us an email
[anonyson@proton.me](mailto:anonyson@proton.me)
